'''''Star Wars'' 4''' is the fourth issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']]. It was written by [[Roy Thomas]], illustrated by [[Howard Chaykin]], and first published on [[July 12]], [[1977]] by [[Marvel Comics]]. The issue features the story "'''In Battle with Darth Vader'''", in which [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] confronts his former pupil, [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Obi-Wan vs Darth Vader! Plus, can Han and Luke rescue Leia?''

==Plot summary==
After having some difficulty escaping [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] aboard the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]], Luke Skywalker, Han Solo, [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], and the rescued [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] Leia Organa meet with the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] at [[Docking Bay 327/Legends|Docking Bay 327]], which holds the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']]. Obi-Wan Kenobi also arrives but is confronted by Darth Vader, and the two engage in a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] duel. Vader strikes Kenobi down in the duel, but in the confusion Luke, Leia, Han, and the rest of the group make their escape from the Death Star aboard the ''Falcon''.

==Development==
''Star Wars 4'' was the first issue of [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'']] to feature fan letters, which were printed in a section called "[[Star-Words]]."

==Continuity==
{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Threepio!'' Have Artoo open the pressure maintenance hatch on unit ''366117891!''|Luke Skywalker|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 4">[[Star Wars (1977) 4|''Star Wars'' (1977) 4]]</ref>}}
In the issue, [[Garbage Compactor 3263827]] is identified as "unit 366117891."
